description: Establish a monitoring system for the Projected Churn Increase Percentage to ensure it remains below a critical threshold during the transition.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is established, WHEN churn metrics are analyzed, THEN alerts should trigger if projected churn exceeds the defined threshold.

description: Migrate from flat monthly pricing to consumption-based pricing where customers pay per metric ingested and per dashboard query. This requires a metering pipeline that tracks usage in real time and a rating engine to apply pricing rules.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new billing engine is implemented, WHEN a customer queries their usage, THEN the system should accurately reflect their consumption and calculate the corresponding charges.

description: Develop an in-app pricing calculator that estimates monthly costs based on current usage patterns and a predictive cost dashboard showing projected spend for the next billing cycle.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the pricing calculator is available, WHEN a customer inputs their usage data, THEN the calculator should provide an accurate cost estimate for the next billing cycle.

description: Create configurable spending alerts (50%, 75%, 90%, 100% of budget) and optional hard spending caps that pause non-critical data ingestion when exceeded.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the spending caps are set, WHEN a customer's usage reaches the defined thresholds, THEN the system should trigger alerts and pause non-critical data ingestion.

description: Develop a grandfathering system that tracks customer cohorts, applies correct pricing tiers, and automatically transitions customers after the lock period with 60-day advance notice.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the grandfathering system is in place, WHEN a customer is identified as an existing customer, THEN they should receive the correct pricing tier for 12 months.

description: Create a dashboard that shows projected spend for the next billing cycle based on current usage patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the predictive cost dashboard is implemented, WHEN a customer views their usage data, THEN the dashboard should accurately display projected costs for the next billing cycle.

description: Create a model that identifies which customer segments will see cost increases vs. decreases under the new pricing, flagging accounts where projected spend increases >30% for proactive outreach.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the churn risk model is developed, WHEN customer data is analyzed, THEN the system should flag accounts with projected spend increases >30%.

story_title: Develop Customer Communication Plan for Migration
description: Develop a communication plan that outlines how customers will be informed about the transition to usage-based pricing, including FAQs and support resources.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the communication plan is developed, WHEN customers are notified about the transition, THEN they should have access to all necessary information and support resources.

description: Address the gap in customer segmentation data to better understand how different customer tiers will react to the new pricing model.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the customer segmentation data is enhanced, WHEN customer data is analyzed, THEN the system should provide insights into customer reactions to pricing changes.
dependencies: story-pricing-calculator, story-predictive-dashboard, story-spending-alerts, story-grandfathering-system, story-churn-risk-model, story-communication-plan

description: Run experiments to test customer sensitivity to different pricing models within the consumption-based framework to understand optimal pricing strategies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the pricing sensitivity tests are conducted, WHEN customer feedback is collected, THEN the results should inform future pricing strategies.
dependencies: story-pricing-calculator, story-predictive-dashboard, story-spending-alerts, story-grandfathering-system, story-churn-risk-model, story-communication-plan

description: Implement a feedback mechanism to collect user insights on the new pricing model and features, allowing for continuous improvement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is in place, WHEN users provide feedback, THEN the system should collect and categorize feedback for analysis.
dependencies: story-pricing-calculator, story-predictive-dashboard, story-spending-alerts, story-grandfathering-system, story-churn-risk-model, story-communication-plan
